title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
